microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ in enterprise impact** across customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivered a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a replicable continuous-validation model.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility with zero customer-facing disruption.
Built an **internal AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill throughput capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code-generation workflows across 14 Azure service teams through hands-on demos and training, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and directly accelerating feature-shipping velocity.

Gathered requirements via **11+ stakeholder interviews** with clinical-equivalent operational teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation.

Improved data retrieval speed by **83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool and enforcing rigorous metadata standards, enabling engineers to unblock themselves faster in production workflows.

Conducted on-site discovery with 20+ operational service teams, identifying 81 hours of manual toil per region launch and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths at scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership real-time visibility to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the full **OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot fleet, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime throughout the transition.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release risk.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process to sustain rapid, reliable shipping cadence.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building and operationalizing a new CRM process from scratch.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile.
Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering a profitability model used in ongoing operational planning.
